name: P90 | 给爷冲
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been custom painted to resemble a P90 intersecting with gaffer tape, tubes, and fire. \"Do you know how fast you were going?\"
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把P90采用了自定义涂装，绘有胶布、管道和火焰相交的图案。 “你知道自己能跑多快吗？”
